author: gasparschott
description: Displays all open notes in a tab group as a continuous scrollable page (sometimes called Scrivenings mode).

manifest.author: Michael Schrauzer
manifest.description: Displays all open notes in a tab group as if they were a continuous scrollable document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Open all notes in Continuous Mode from a folder, search results, or links in a file or Dataview/query block; use arrow keys to navigate between notes; display notes in “Compact Mode” similar to Evernote or Bear; reorder notes via tab header drag-and-drop, sorting, more.
manifest.name: Continuous Mode

name: Continuous Mode

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.12
• FIXED: Obsidian’s stacked tabs mode was broken if the Continuous Mode plugin was enabled (even if it was not applied to a stacked tab group).

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
## 3.6.11

Some behind-the-scenes fixes to improve plugin code review status.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.10
• FIXED: Error when appending a file that was already open.  
• FIXED: Scroll-into-view failed when clicking a File Explorer item that was already open.  
• FIXED: Prevent scroll-into-view after pressing Shift, Control, Option/Alt, Meta/Command, or Function keys.  
• IMPROVED: Changed the default setting for “Maximum number of items to open at one time” to 10 instead of 0. This prevents new users from accidentally opening all the items in a File Explorer folder when testing the plugin’s functionality.  
• IMPROVED: Updated instructions in the settings for clarity.  
• IMPROVED: Updated the ReadMe with additional information, and edited for clarity.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.9.1

Fixed a typo.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.9  

• IMPROVED: Reworked warnings for simplicity and removed the "Disable warnings" setting. Notably, now when attempting to open more than the set maximum number of files, a notice will be displayed that shows the number of files being opened out of the total number. Also added an option to show a warning when replacing items in the active tab group (default is no warning).  
• IMPROVED: Settings styles.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.8

Changed version number; no other changes to code.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.0h  
• FIXED: Opening search results in Continuous Mode did not respect the sort order (#39).
releases.name: 3.6.0h

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.0g  
• FIXED: Typewriter scrolling only worked for arrow navigation, not actual typing.
releases.name: 3.6.0g

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.0f  
• IMPROVED: Completely rewrote arrow navigation code, which was an embarrassing mess, and fixed a number of bugs along the way. It’s still a bit of mess, but it works™.  
• IMPROVED: Typewriter scrolling now works much more effectively. Previously, the editor only scrolled when the cursor moved into a new paragraph; now it scrolls whenever the cursor moves to a new visual line.
• Other bug fixes and code cleanup.
releases.name: 3.6.0f

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.0e  
• More fixes for recursive folder opening and for opening items in collapsed File Explorer folders.  
• FIXED: Typewriter scrolling via the arrow keys was broken.  
• FIXED: The “Disable all warnings” setting did not in fact disable all warnings.  
• ADDED: New command: “Toggle navigate in place.”  
• IMPROVED: Rearranged settings for clarity.
releases.name: 3.6.0e

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.0d

• IMPROVED: To prevent confusion, if the default sort order is "File Explorer order" and open recursively is true, clicking a collapsed folder in the File Explorer will open the items in alphabetical order instead of doing nothing.  
• FIXED: Changing the sort order of the active tab group was broken (again!).

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.0c
• FIXED: Recursive folder opening in new splits up/down/left/right was not working.  
• IMPROVED: Avoid reopening files when all the items in a folder are already open (and no others are open) in the active split.  
• ADDED: User setting to hide the tab bar when opening in Continuous Mode.  
• ADDED: Command to toggle tab bar display in the active workspace split.  
• FIXED: Hopefully fixed a display issue where some leaves would be much taller than their actual content height.  
• FIXED: ArrowUp navigation between notes sometimes failed.  
• FIXED: A conflict with the “Open Tab Settings” plugin where clicking a File Explorer folder more than once would alternately cause one of the contained files not to open.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.0b
• Many fixes for opening folders recursively. Please report any issues.  
• ADDED: Inline titles are now sized according to their depth within the File Explorer folder hierarchy: top-level size is H1, decreasing to H6; inline titles for any files nested deeper than 6 subfolders will be one size smaller than H6.  
• FIXED: Scroll active leaf into view was broken in most cases.
releases.name: 3.6.0b

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.6.0a: New features and important bug-fixes! Thanks for your patience.  
• ADDED: Option to open folders recursively from the file explorer.  
• ADDED: Option to open folders using the displayed File Explorer order. This is useful not only because there are subtle differences between strict alphabetical order and the file explorer default, but also because any custom File Explorer sorting applied via a plugin will now be honored. Note that the order will be alphabetical if the clicked folder is collapsed.   
• FIXED: Problems with the append and replace actions in which files and leaves were opened or closed incorrectly. Solving this had been troublesome for some time, and the solution (which, as so often happens, was something simple and in hindsight, obvious), allowed for some major simplifications in the code logic.  
• FIXED: Problems with opening files in new splits.  
• FIXED: Changing the sort order of open files closed all the files instead.  
• FIXED: Arrow navigation between notes failed.  
• MISC: Code cleanup.  
• MISC: Began updating readme.
releases.name: 3.6.0a

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.5.2
• FIXED: Dragging files from the File Explorer into an open note (e.g., for adding a link or embedding a file) also opened the dragged file in a new tab.
• FIXED: Continuous Mode context menu was being added twice in some situations.
• CHANGED: Removed some code that attempted to prevent duplicate leaves when opening single items from the File Explorer. I recommend installing the "Open Tab Settings" plugin by jesse-r-s-hines to prevent duplicate tabs.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
3.5.1

- Fixed: Arrow keys did not work when editing text in Canvas items.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.5.0
• Mobile: Re-enabled installation on mobile Obsidian.  
• Mobile: Much improved mobile compatibility.   
      - Continuous Mode context menus now work properly.   
      - Fixed several issues with arrow navigation between notes.  
      - There are likely to be bugs; please report any you find.  
• Other small bug and UI fixes.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.4.5

• Minor bug fixes and code cleanup.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.4.4

Fix for [#36 ](https://github.com/gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode/issues/36)

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.4.3

• Fixed: arrow keys didn't work when editing properties.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.4.2

• Improved display and behavior of alerts and warnings.
• Bug fixes.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.4.1

 - Fix: prevent scroll-into-view after clicking a contextual menu item in the editor.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.4.0

• Added compatibility with base files, with a setting to include them when opening items in Continuous Mode.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.3.3

• Minor bug fixes.   
• Added versions.json.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.3.2

FIXED: Compact mode could be incorrectly applied to right split on app start.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.3.1: Bug fixes.

FIXED: Semi-compact mode options missing from contextual menus.  
FIXED: "Replace compact mode" contextual menu item did not work.  
FIXED: Opening an item in a new split created duplicate tabs.  
FIXED: Some issues with toggling compact modes.  
FIXED: Some issues with restoring Continuous Mode on app start and plugin reload.  
FIXED: Excalidraw diagrams were not visible in Continuous Mode.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.3.0
• *NEW:* Added setting to place index files (e.g., “index.md” or files with the same name as the parent directory) at the top of the opened files when opening a directory in Continuous Mode.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.2.1
• Added two "open in place" commands to complement the new "navigate in place" function.
• Enabled File Explorer folders to selected when using navigate in place; requires my [Smooth Explorer](https://github.com/gasparschott/smooth-explorer) plugin, which is still awaiting approval for Community Plugins.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.2.0  
• **NEW!:** Use the up/down arrow keys at the first or last lines of a note to open the previous/next note (as listed in the File Explorer) in the same tab.  This means that you can easily scan through files without opening new tabs or switching to the File Explorer.  There is a new "Allow Continuous Mode navigate in place" setting to enable this behavior.
• Reordered some items in the Settings for clarity.  
• Updated Readme.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.1.7
• FIXED: Changes to the scrolling behavior in the settings were not being honored until the plugin was reloaded or Obsidian restarted.   
• INTERNAL: Removed pdf page navigation code as it is not needed; left/right arrow keys work natively to display prev/next page.
• Other fixes for pdf page navigation.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description: Really fixed arrow keys not working in inputs and textareas.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description: Fixed: Arrow keys wouldn't work in textareas or input elements.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.1.4
• Fixed: Up arrow navigation between leaves would cause the newly active leaf to scroll all the way to the top.   
• Fixed: Left and right sidebar items didn't properly scroll into view.   
• Added: A user setting to enable/disable typewriter scrolling (which had been previously enabled always when smooth scrolling was enabled).   
• Fixed: Some small but irritating style issues, including a 1 or 2 pixel shift when tab/leaf focus changed.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.1.3
Removed setting “Always Open in Continuous Mode,” which was never implemented and, given other functionality of the plugin, is not really needed. 
See 3.1.0 for complete changelog.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
## 3.1.2
Added missing commands:  
• “Toggle Continuous Mode in root tab groups”  
• “Toggle visibility of note titles in root tab groups”  
See 3.1.0 for a complete list of changes, including breaking changes.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
## 3.1.1

Fixed a couple of small bugs.   
Please read the release notes for 3.1.0 for a complete list of changes.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.1.0:
• BREAKING CHANGES: The functions for storing Continuous and Compact Mode data in the settings have been rewritten, so after updating you will need to manually restore the correct mode to your open tab groups.
• Improved: Reworked the "Open items in Continuous Mode" function to make it less incomprehensible. Now dupe leaves are more reliably prevented from opening, and the original open leaf is made active instead. This makes it easy to use the File Explorer to jump from note to note by clicking the file name (assuming you have set the "Single Click to open items in Continuous Mode" preference to one of the "Append" options).
• Improved: prevent flash display of temporary pin icons in tab headers when opening items in Continuous Mode.
• Fixed: Pinned tabs weren't preserved when opening items in Continuous Mode.
• Fixed: Some issues with opening files when the "Allow Single Click to Open Folder Action" setting was disabled (i.e., set to "—").
• Fixed: Some issues with opening files using the "Open in Continuous Mode" context menu items.
• Fixed: Some issues with opening files using the built-in commands.
• Improved: If "Single click to open folders" is enabled, clicking on a closed folder in the File Explorer will open it; if it is already open, it will remain open.
• Style improvements for the Settings.
• Many other bug fixes and improvements.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.0.6:
• FIXED: Selecting a note from the tab header tab list did not scroll the selected note into view.
• FIXED: Clicking inside a note would cause it to scroll to the top.
• Other arrow navigation bug fixes that seemed to come out of nowhere....
• Minor style fixes.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### FIXED:
- Arrow keys didn't work in note headers.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.0.5.2  
- Set the plugin to desktop only. (I should have done this a long time ago.)

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description: Quick fix for compact mode.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.0.5: 
• Fixed: Overhauled arrow navigation, including various fixes for dealing with inline-titles, reading view, source mode, and live preview. Movement from one note to the next should be more reliable now.   
    • Made it possible to navigate between notes when continuously pressing down the ArrowUp/ArrowDown keys.   
• Improved compact modes styling.   
• Improved: When opening multiple items with the context menus, the first opened leaf will be selected and made active instead of the last. When only one item is opened, it will be selected and made active.    
• Other bug fixes.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.0.4b: 
• Fixed: Issue [#29](https://github.com/gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode/issues/29) again.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.0.3b: Bugfixes
• Fixed: Commands to toggle Continuous Mode in left or right sidebar failed.  
• Fixed: Issue [#27](https://github.com/gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode/issues/27)  
• Fixed: Issue [#28](https://github.com/gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode/issues/28) Note that with this fix the "scroll into view" settings managed by the plugin have have been changed to a simple "enable/disable" toggle.  
• Fixed: Issue [#29](https://github.com/gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode/issues/29)

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.0.2b:  
• Fixed an issue where replacing items in the active split failed.  
• Fixed an issue that prevented arrow navigation in Properties.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.0.1b:   
• Fixed an issue that prevented normal arrow navigation in active Semi-Compact Mode notes.  
• Fixed a styling issue with Compact Modes.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 3.0.0b: Major update: new features, bug fixes, and code improvements.
• **NEW:** Compact Mode and Semi-Compact Mode: This allows you to emulate the note preview sidebar found in apps like Bear or Evernote. 
	• When Compact Mode is active, the left split will preview the first few lines of each open note (or a thumbnail for images). Clicking a preview or otherwise making it active will open the note in the right sidebar.  
	• When Semi-Compact Mode is active, the active note will be displayed normally.  
	• Compact Mode notes can be navigated with the arrow keys.  
	• Added user settings to open clicked file explorer folders or files in compact mode.  
	• Note: You may wish to disable the Obsidian editor setting ```Always focus new tabs``` to allow continuous arrow navigation of Compact View items.  
• Several improvements to the scroll into view behavior.   
• Improved single click to open file explorer item. Now the action is only triggered by a simple click, and not by a two-finger click or if the alt/option, ctrl, or shift keys are pressed.  
• Improved single click to append files from the file explorer.  
• Added user setting to disable some warnings (e.g., when replacing a split with folder contents).  
• Added user setting to always hide note headers in Continuous and Compact Mode.  
• Added user setting to only show note header file name in Compact Mode.  
• Fixed some issues with reading the list of extra file types to be opened in Continuous Mode.  
• Fixed an issue where pinned status of leaves was not remembered when performing various Continuous Mode actions.  
• Fixed some issues with arrow navigation between leaves.  
• Removed the "Clear stored data" setting, as stored data is now automatically pruned when the plugin unloads.  
• Made the borders between notes in Continuous Mode less prominent.  
• Reorganized context menus.  
• Many other small bugfixes.  
• Updated ReadMe.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 2.2.2
• **ADDED:** Commands to change the sort order of notes in the active tab group.  
• **ADDED:** User setting to set the default sort order when opening multiple items in Continuous Mode.  
• **ADDED:** User setting to disable scroll sidebar items into view when they are selected or become active.  
• **FIXED:** Problems with sorting files when there was an empty new tab in the tab group.  
• **IMPROVED:** Tab headers scroll into view when the active leaf changes.  
• **IMPROVED:** Clicking in a leaf will scroll it or the clicked line/item into view. This can be disabled by enabling "Disable scroll active note into view" in the Settings.  
• **IMPROVED:** Arrow navigation in properties/frontmatter blocks.  
• **IMPROVED:** Arrow navigation in sidebars.  
• **INTERNAL:** Minimized use of javascript function scrollIntoView, as a long-standing Chrome bug prevents simultaneous scrolling of two or more elements into view; use scrollTo instead.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 2.2.1
• **FIXED:** Continuous Mode was listed twice in the tab group menu.    
• **FIXED:** Bottom margin of notes in reading view was set to 0.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 2.2.0
• **ADDED:** A whole bunch of commands for opening items in Continuous Mode that were formerly only available via the context menus.  
• **ADDED:** Enabled Continuous Mode in the sidebars. This can be toggled via the context menus or commands. For clarity, the title of each sidebar pane is displayed; these titles can be hidden with the "Hide note headers" menu item or command.  
• **FIXED:** Continuous Mode wasn't always restored on app launch or when the plugin was deactivated and reactivated.  
• **FIXED:** PDFs leaves should scroll to top when entering via arrow navigation.  
• **FIXED:** Completely reworked compatibility with Longform plugin to work around an issue with accessing project metadata.  
• Other fixes and code clean up.  
• Updated the Readme.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 2.1.2
• **IMPROVED:** Removed scroll to top of note when entering previous note with up arrow key.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 2.1.1
• **FIXED:** Some further fixes for sorting when opening files in Continuous Mode with the context menu items.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 2.1.0
• **ADDED:** Scroll the active tab header into view when active leaf changes. Useful when there are many tabs open in the tab group.
• **FIXED:** Items with numbers in their names were not sorted in the correct order when opening multiple items in Continuous Mode.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 2.0.0
• Completely reworked the Continuous Mode core styles, removing ```display:contents```, which was causing all sorts of problems. In particular, scroll into view should be much more reliable now. Please report any new problems.
• **FIXED:** Clicking note titles in the tab group menu did not properly select and scroll leaf into view.
• **FIXED:** Single click to open file explorer folders wasn't working.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.7.3
Minor UI fixes and internal code changes.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.7.2
**IMPROVED:** Clicking in empty area below the last note will select it.  
**SETTINGS:** Changed "Exclude embedded files" to "Include embedded files"; you will need to enable or disable this setting again according to your preference.  
**FIXED:** OutlinerMD files did not display correctly in Continuous Mode.  
**IMPROVED:** Arrow navigation in and out of OutlinerMD files. Arrow navigation still fails in some circumstances, possibly because of issues within the OutlinerMD plugin itself.  
**IMPROVED:** Added more information to the Readme file.
Other minor UI changes.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.7.1
• **IMPROVED:** Open document and query block links in listed order instead of alphabetizing.

#### 1.7.0
• **ADDED:** Basic support for “Longform” plugin. Files are opened in their project order (i.e. not alphabetically); however, tab order is not automatically refreshed when the project order is changed, nor are new files automatically opened when new scenes are created. Instead, open the project again in Continuous Mode using the "replace" option.
• **ADDED:** Support for “File Tree Alternative” plugin.
• **FIXED:** First leaf in new split was not always focused after opening items.
• **FIXED:** An issue with the settings tab failing to open correctly.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.7.0
• **ADDED:** Basic support for “Longform” plugin. Files are opened in their project or scene order (i.e. not alphabetically); however, tab order is not automatically refreshed when the project order is changed, nor are new files automatically opened when new scenes are created. Instead, open the project again in Continuous Mode using the "replace" option.
• **ADDED:** Support for “File Tree Alternative” plugin.
• **FIXED:** First leaf in new split was not always focused after opening items.
• **FIXED:** An issue with the settings tab failing to open correctly.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.6.1
• **FIX:** Minor fixes for the query block button.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.6.0
• **ADDED:** Menu item to open all file links from Dataview and Query blocks in Continuous Mode. Limitation: not available in floating windows.
• **ADDED:** Menu item to open all document links in Continuous Mode.
• **ADDED:** Settings option to ignore embedded files when opening document links in Continuous Mode.
• **ADDED:** Settings option to limit the number of items to open at one time in Continuous Mode.
• **ADDED:** Settings option to open folder items in Continuous Mode from the File Explorer with one click.
• **FIXED:** Arrow key navigation failed in floating windows.
• **FIXED:** Continuous Mode was not removed from floating windows when it was disabled in Obsidian settings.
• **IMPROVED:** Cleaned up CSS, remove redundant styles.
• **KNOWN PROBLEM:** Notes in floating windows sometimes become uneditable, seemingly at random. Unfortunately, I have been unable to determine why this occurs. Two possible fixes: 1) disable Continuous Mode, select each note to make it active, enable Continuous Mode again; 2) close the window completely and open the files again in another window. 
• **OTHER:** CSS cleanup

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.5.5

• **FIXED:** Sorting notes in floating windows.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.5.4
• More fixes for workspace splits.

#### 1.5.3
• Yet more fixes for floating windows.

#### 1.5.2  
• **FIXED**: Toggling continuous Mode failed with vertical splits.  
• **FIXED**: Toggling continuous Mode failed after plugin reload.

#### 1.5.1
• **FIXED:** Continuous Mode did not work reliably with floating windows.  
• **IMPROVED:** Status of floating windows is now restored on app startup.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.5.3
• Yet more fixes for floating windows.

#### 1.5.2  
• **FIXED**: Toggling continuous Mode failed with vertical splits.  
• **FIXED**: Toggling continuous Mode failed after plugin reload.

#### 1.5.1
• **FIXED:** Continuous Mode did not work reliably with floating windows.  
• **IMPROVED:** Status of floating windows is now restored on app startup.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.5.2

• **FIXED:** Toggling continuous Mode failed with vertical splits.
• **FIXED:** Toggling continuous Mode failed after plugin reload.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.5.1  
• **FIXED:** Continuous Mode did not work reliably with floating windows. 
• **IMPROVED:** Status of floating windows is now restored on app startup.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
#### 1.5.0  
• **ADDED:** Open search results in Continuous Mode contextual menu.  
• **ADDED:** Open individual files in Continuous Mode contextual menu.  
• **ADDED:** Sort open tab group notes by name, modified date, or created date via the tab group, notes, and editor contextual menus.  
• **IMPROVED:** Opening in Continuous Mode now respects current File Explorer/Search sort order.  
• **IMPROVED:** Improved "scroll active note into view" code. Note: scroll into view fails when clicking a tab header the first time, and before the note has been scrolled into view at least once. This appears to be an issue with Obsidian.  
• **IMPROVED:** Disabled scrolling pdfs, unless the note is active. This matches the behavior of canvas notes and graphs.  
• **IMPROVED:** Display of graphs and canvas notes: they now fill the height of the window, allowing the header to viewed.  
• **ADDED:** Settings option to disable custom "scroll active note into view" behavior and restore default behavior.  
• **FIXED:** Several issues with appending folder items that prevented all items from being appended.  
• **FIXED:** Some issues with storing the included file types and excluded files lists in the settings.  
• **FIXED:** Some issues with arrow navigation in pdf files.  
• **FIXED:** An issue with using the arrow keys in inputs and textareas.  
• Code cleanup.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
**Added:** Settings for filtering file types to open when choosing one of the “open folder in continuous mode” contextual menu items.  
    • Filter markdown, canvas, images, media, and pdfs. 
     • Add custom file extensions to allow (assuming you have installed a plugin to allow Obsidian to open them, e.g., html, plain text and code files, etc.).  
    • Add custom file names to ignore (e.g., index.md).  
**Added:** Setting to clear the stored list of tab groups with continuous mode active.  This optional action prevents the list from getting unwieldy or cluttered with stale data, which can happen if you frequently open and close new tab groups.  
**Improved:** Disabled scrolling canvas and graph contents in Continuous Mode, unless the note is active. This makes it possible to scroll through a stack of notes without getting “stuck” on these types of notes. 
    • If editing a canvas file (i.e., canvas leaf is active), click the background to deselect any active node and use the up and down arrow keys to navigate to the adjacent note.
    • When a graph is active, use shift + arrow keys to move the graph around.
**Improved:** Relocated the contextual menu items for better categorization.
Updated README file.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
Added additional ways to open folders:
• Open in new split up
• Open in new split down
• Open or append folder in active tab group
• Replace active tab group with folder

Replaced Continuous Mode menu icon and added icons for submenu items.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
• Fixed Continuous Mode not working after layout change (#12).
• Fixed incorrect image styling (#10).

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
Fixed incorrect display of tabs (forgot to delete experimental CSS).

From 1.2.0:
• NEW: Added menu item to open folders in Continuous Mode(!).
• IMPROVED: Moved toggle continuous mode menu item to submenu; added show/hide note headers menu item.
• IMPROVED: Pdfs now only take up the full window height, not the entire length of the pdf.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
• NEW: Added menu item to open folders in Continuous Mode(!).
• IMPROVED: Moved toggle continuous mode menu item to submenu; added show/hide note headers menu item.
• IMPROVED: Pdfs now only take up the full window height, not the entire length of the pdf.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
• Improved: Made scrolling notes into view on tab header click more reliable.
• Improved: Don't scroll to canvas header after clicking tab header; allows full view of canvas note within window.
• Improved: Arrow navigation between notes is more reliable, especially for pdfs and html notes.
• Added: Use left/right arrow keys to scroll html notes up and down or to navigate from page to page in pdfs. (Space bar still works for default scrolling.)

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
Fixed:
Canvas notes did not display properly in Continuous Mode.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
* Fixed: Continuous Mode was not restored when opening a new session or changing workspaces.
* Fixed: Changing workspaces could delete tab groups ids from saved settings.
* Fixed: Toggling Continuous Mode via the tab group menu item would always toggle the active tab group, not the tab group actually belonging to the menu.
* Fixed: Menu checkmark now correctly reflects the status of the current tab group.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description: Fixed continuous mode not working in popout windows. For now, settings will not remember if continuous mode is active or not in popout windows; this may change later.

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description:
Changelog:
• Fixed arrow navigation in non-markdown notes (e.g., images, pdfs, media files, etc.)
• Removed scroll into view when using arrows to navigate notes.
• Added "Continuous mode" menu item to tab group menu (thanks Gorkycreator for the suggestion).

releases.author: gasparschott
releases.description: Initial release with updates.
releases.name: Initial release
